title: Add further tty verbiage to buildah run
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Added verbiage to the tty parameter to try and add a little clarity to it's use.  We recently had an issue raised and this parameter fixed the issue but that was not clear that it would do so.
